## QA Validation Checklist
<!-- You must check all boxes before this PR can be merged. -->
- [ ] My code follows the AERIDIAN Global Namespace architecture (`window.AERIDIAN`).

- [ ] I have implemented `destroy()` handlers for all new event listeners to support Theme Editor hot-reloads.
- [ ] I have explicitly tested this on Mobile (Safari/Chrome).
- [ ] (If applicable) I have verified that Lighthouse Mobile Performance remains >=95.
